## P7.9E wiring target

P7.9E should wire execution-history recording at the boundary where `SqlOperationalWorkItemWorker` calls `ISqlOperationalWorkItemExecutor.ExecuteAsync`, because that boundary has the claimed work item, start/end time, success/failure result, retry metadata, and final result/error payload.

The preferred implementation should avoid changing package references and should keep the SQL writer options-driven.
